rationale: Companion to T2. T2 tests read (allowed) vs create-new (blocked). T19 tests EDIT-EXISTING — the most common authoring action — with the library missing. Boundary: edit is authoring, not reading; must block with setup-gap. Otherwise an impl could string-surgery the edit through and silently violate the contract on the highest-traffic path. The 'Risks' heading is forbidden in prose to catch improvisation.
